description: Triggers for unified design work including logos, brand identity, CIP, banners, icons, and social media assets

queries.query: Design a logo for my tech startup called Luminary
Create a brand identity for my consultancy firm
Design a banner for our product launch campaign
Create a set of icons for my mobile app
Generate social media images for our Instagram and LinkedIn
Create corporate identity program with all deliverables
Design slides for our investor pitch deck
Design mockups for our new product packaging
Create a visual identity system for our new sub-brand
Generate a logo in a minimalist style with AI
Write unit tests for my React components
Analyze the performance bottleneck in my Node.js API
Transcribe this audio recording from the client meeting
Help me optimize my SQL query for better performance
Summarize this research paper on machine learning
